name: Fido's Cheese Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Hot Water or Meat Juices
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 10
1. In a large bowl, pour hot water over oatmeal and margarine. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Stir in powdered milk, grated cheese, salt, and egg.
3. Add cornmeal and wheat germ. Mix well.
4. Add flour, 1/3 cup at a time, mixing well after each addition. Knead until a very stiff dough forms, adding more flour if necessary.
5. Pat or roll the dough to a thickness of about 1/2 inch.
6. Cut into bone-shaped biscuits and place on a greased baking sheet.
7. Bake for 1 hour at 300 degrees F.
8. Turn off heat and leave in oven for an additional 1 1/2 hours or longer.
9. Makes approximately 2 1/4 pounds.
